_readme: One-time install — paste this prompt to Claude Code:
Check architecture/templates/settings.local.template.json and follow the install prompt in _readme.
Install steps (Claude Code will do these automatically from the prompt above):
- replace <personal-path>  with the absolute path to this repo (run: pwd && echo $HOME)
- replace <home-username>  with your macOS username (from echo $HOME)
and extracting the UUID segment. Only ask if no Figma MCP connection is found.
DESIGN INTENT: This file is fully self-contained. It does NOT assume anything in
the global ~/.claude/settings.json. File access is scoped to this project folder
and ~/.claude/ only — Claude Code cannot read or write anywhere else on your disk.
Safe to use even if you keep your global settings at defaults.
WARNING: If you followed a setup guide that wrote a global ~/.claude/settings.json
with bare 'Read', 'Write', or 'Edit' (no path restriction), those global entries
override this file's path-scoped access — Claude Code will be able to access your
entire disk regardless. To enforce project-scoped access, remove the bare Read/Write/Edit
entries from ~/.claude/settings.json, or skip that step in the setup guide entirely.
